heroSub: Custom websites, SEO, and branding for the trades, shops, restaurants, and manufacturers of Stanley and central Gaston County. No templates, no lock-in, and you own every line of it.
localH2: Built for Stanley and central Gaston County.
localP1: Stanley grew from gold mining in the 1800s when prospectors worked Stanley Creek, which supplied ore to the U.S. Mint. After the Civil War came textiles: Stanley Creek Cotton Mills, established in 1891, drove the town's industrial era. The South Fork Catawba River powers this region still, and the businesses here carry that working heritage of practical, reliable craft.
localP2: We build for the people who keep this town going: the contractor and the machine shop, the restaurant on Main Street, the home-service crew covering Gaston County from Stanley toward Mount Holly and Dallas. Every site is designed and coded around your business, not stamped out of a template.
mapMetaLine: Serving Stanley, Mount Holly, Dallas, Lincolnton, Iron Station & the Charlotte metro
